title: Germany men's national under-18 ice hockey team
summary: The Germany men's national under-18 ice hockey team is the men's national under-18 ice hockey team of Germany. The team is controlled by the German Ice Hockey Federation, a member of the International Ice Hockey Federation. The team represents Germany at the IIHF World U18 Championships.
text:
The Germany men's national under-18 ice hockey team is the men's national under-18 ice hockey team of Germany. The team is controlled by the German Ice Hockey Federation, a member of the International Ice Hockey Federation. The team represents Germany at the IIHF World U18 Championships.

International competitions
IIHF European U18/U19 Championships
IIHF World U18 Championships
